## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential fractional engagement between Talal Syed and growthx.ai, focusing on SEO and automation.](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Talal proposes starting with a limited, fractional engagement (3 months) before potentially scaling to full-time](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Focus areas: elevating SEO best practices across teams and potentially contributing to thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Tentative rate: $150/hr, flexible based on engagement scope and hours](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Jason to discuss internally and revert with a structured proposal](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

## Topics

### Engagement Structure

  - [Talal suggests starting with a limited, fractional engagement](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
      - [3-month initial period to ensure mutual fit](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
      - [Potential to scale to full-time if successful](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Jason agrees, citing easier internal approval for this approach](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Flexible structure: project-based or hourly, with clear 30/60/90-day goals](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Talal's capacity: up to 20 hours/week max, flexible based on needs](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

### Focus Areas

  - [Primary focus: SEO and automation](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Two potential tracks discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
    1.  Marketing/go-to-market for growthx.ai
          - [Thought leadership and community-building](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
          - [High-quality content creation (e.g., Talal's paper-based article approach)](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
    2.  Client-side delivery
          - [Elevating SEO best practices across teams](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
          - [Implementing and standardizing processes](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

### Content and Thought Leadership

  - [Jason impressed by Talal's article analyzing research papers](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [growthx.ai working on educational content (e.g., LLM fundamentals course for marketers)](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Potential for creating a flywheel: client work → thought leadership content → public sharing](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Terms

  - [Talal's standard rate: $150/hr, potentially lower for higher volume](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Flexible on pricing, prioritizing a successful working relationship](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Final terms to be determined based on engagement scope](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### Team Structure and Reporting

  - [Talal likely to report to Jason](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Potential interaction with Andy (account management, delivery processes)](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Work may involve selecting a "guinea pig" client for initial implementation](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to discuss internally with team](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Determine best starting point and structure for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Jason to revert with a more detailed proposal](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Finalize engagement terms, scope, and start date](https://fathom.video/share/h-x_6-dF-axzx4zU7AKcA9_StwUGNTHn?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
